/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION FOR RE-SENTENCE PURSUANT TO PC 1170(D)(1)/PD/X:THE JUDGE AND ALL COUNSEL ARE APPEARING VIA ZOOM, MR, WILLIAMS IS APPEARING VIA TELEPHONE FROM SAN QUENTIN STATE PRISON,/X:ADA AND DEFENSE COUNSEL BOTH MAKE STATEMENTS AS TO THE REASONS FOR A RE-SENTENCE IN THIS CASE/X:THE COURT MAKES A STATEMENT AND GRANTS THE MOTION FOR RE-SENTENCE AS FOLLOWS:/AJW/X:THE COURT STRIKES ONE PRIOR STRIKE, A CONVICTION OF PC 211 FROM 1986/X:COUNT 2 IS THE PRINCIPAL COUNT/667(D)(E)/ /X:SENTENCE IN COUNT1 IS TO RUN CONCURRENT TO COUNT 2/CH2:SP 10 Y:M/CH1:SP 6 Y:M/X:AS TO COUNT 5/CH3:CJ 6 M/X:CTS OF 6 MONTHS AS TO COUNT 5/ENH:CH2:TYPE12022(B)PC:TI2Y:CS/ENH:CH2:TYPE667(A)(1)PC:TI5Y:CS/ENH:CH2:TYPE667(A)(1)PC:TI5Y:CS/ENH:CH1:TYPE12022(B)PC:TI2Y:S/X:TOTAL 22 YEARS STATE PRISON/CTORD:CREDITS ARE TO BE CALCULATED BY CDCR, THE DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE A STANDARD PERIOD OFPAROLE/DNACOMP/X:THE COLLECTION OF ANY REMAINING FINES AND FEES IS STAYEDBY THE COURT DUE TO MR, WILLIAMS' INABILITY TO PAY/
